description_long: This is a compact, modern two-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, pale yellow material. The sofa features a boxy silhouette with straight, thick armrests and a continuous, high backrest that provides ample support. Two loose, matching square cushions are placed at each end, adding comfort and a touch of softness to the otherwise structured design. The seat appears to be a single, uniform cushion, seamlessly integrated with the base. The sofa sits low to the ground, with its legs either hidden or recessed, giving it a grounded and minimalist appearance. The upholstery is solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a clean and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, pale yellow two-seater sofa with straight armrests, a high backrest, and two loose matching cushions. The design is boxy, minimalist, and features smooth, solid upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, both armrests, the high backrest, and two loose square cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest, the depth of the seat, and the profile of the backrest and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, high backrest and the sofa's solid, unadorned back surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest and the arrangement of the cushions from the side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose, matching square back cushions placed at each end; single, uniform seat cushion integrated with the base; all cushions are uniform in size and color.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, thick, boxy armrests at each end, extending from the seat to the height of the backrest, fully padded and matching the upholstery.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design that gives the sofa a low, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, straight backrest with no segmentation or tufting, providing full-width support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid pale yellow color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, textures, or decorative stitching.
